title: Create: Industries
description: Combines Create v6+ & Big Globe+ into a unique experience, with latest vanilla backports
body:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/445XOtBz/images/058055b7ee46b5dda464eddad4b9bef9850aa460.png)

A fresh Create experience, built around exploration, visual polish, and meaningful vanilla improvements, with a unique progression.

### Core Features
- World height increased to -1024 to 1024, making the world 5 times larger than vanilla.
- A lot of Create v6 addons.
- 5 new bosses, optimized for progression.
- 36 new & modified armor sets, optimized for progression.
- 29 new ores from Mythic Metals, Mythic Upgrade & Create Nuclear.
- Realistic electricity with Power Grid.
- Backported features from the latest Minecraft versions, such as the Copper Age and the Pale Garden.
- An overhauled Deeper and Darker experience on the overworld.
- Expands cave biomes & structures.
- Traveling to other planets.
- Complete fishing overhaul with Tide 2.
- Wearable items with Accessories.
- Gliders

### Visual/Graphics
- Aesthetically pleasing & dynamic interfaces.
- Optimized huge render distance with Distant Horizons.
- Beautifully optimized shaders.
- Smooth camera movement.
- Optional 4K FSR Upscaler.
- 15 new beautiful soundtracks by C418.
- Overhauled sounds system.
- Flying birds and tiny visual critters.

### Patched Vanilla Inconveniences
- Convenient game rules: No phantoms, No mob grief.
- Day and night time duration both increased to one hour.
- Immediate blocking with shields, no delays.
- No jump delay.

### Performance
- Optimized server-side.
- Removes most surface structures in place of underground dungeon structures.

### FAQ
- Can't find any villager structures? They are now in space, on other planets!
- Estimated avarage gameplay time is ~125 hours to complete the game, >300 hours for completionists.

### Guides
- [Create](https://createmod.wiki)
- [Alloy Forgery: How to Build a Forge](https://docs.wispforest.io/alloy-forgery/building-a-forge)
- [Galosphere](https://www.minecraft-guides.com/mod/galosphere/)
- [Deeper and Darker](https://www.minecraft-guides.com/mod/deeper-and-darker/)

### Hardware Requirements
Client - Singleplayer
- Allocated RAM: 8gb minimum, 10gb recommended (if you are multiplayer: 6gb minimum)
- CPU: 8 cores minimum, 10 cores recommended (if you are on multiplayer, the cpu matters less)
- GPU: Equivalent to an GeForce GTX 1050 or Radeon RX 560 (with shaders)

Server - Multiplayer
- Allocated RAM: 6gb minimum (2 players), 12gb recommended (8 players)
- CPU: 6 cores minimum (2 players), 8 cores recommended (8 players)

For support, you can find me here: https://discord.gg/DEd86Bfd8

[Icon Source](https://www.reddit.com/r/CreateMod/comments/tv7vsh/ive_been_working_on_an_icon_for_my_create_server) (idk i found it funny)

Happy factorying!
